rows.label: qev031503_MSG0001
rows.name:
Haha! An incredible number of beasts
are heading this way![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0002
rows.name:
Looks like it's going to be a fun battle!
How about it, [ST:playername ]!
Shall we start the brawl?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod and say you can go right away.

rows.label: qev031503_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that you aren't fully prepared yet.

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm leaving it to you!
Well then... I'm off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Hey! Oche Wolfen!
Are you coming too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0005
rows.name:
Of course! I'll show you just how brave
and tough a man of the Tree Clan is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0006
rows.name:
Heh... Well then, I don't care if it's a disaster or ruin,
let's crush them all together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hurry up and get ready!
I'm so fired up for a big brawl after so long,
I'm on the verge of exploding![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0008
rows.name:
I threw all the techniques I've trained up until now
at them right on the edge!
As expected, a huge brawl is the best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0009
rows.name:
I don't care if the opponent is Growth or Bias
or beasts or whatever!
I want to go on an even bigger rampage![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0010
rows.name:
Tch... Idiots...
Even though this isn't the time for Tree Clan and Cavern Clan
to be fighting each other as fellow Bias...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Well, whatever.
If they don't want to join hands,
I'll just do whatever I want on my own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0012
rows.name:
So... You go
help out those weak-looking guys.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0013
rows.name:
The beasts are right in front of us,
yet there's another enemy too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031503_MSG0014
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]!
Take them out as a warm-up, won't you?
It'll be a piece of cake, right?[ST:wait ]
